languages.text: {n}Ведка лишь плотнее сжимает губы.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я не могу. Я согрешу против Бога-Императора, если не защищу вас в бою!"
{n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка лишь плотнее сжимает губы.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я не могу. Я согрешу против Бога-Императора, если не защищу вас в бою!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I can't. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
{n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
"But... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I can't. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
{n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I can't. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
{n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

languages.text: 「でも… あなたの{mf|御方|御方}、私はできません。戦場であなたを守らなかったら、神皇帝に背くことになります！」
languages.original_text: "But... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I can't. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: 「でも… あなたの{mf|御方|御方}、私はできません。戦場であなたを守らなかったら、神皇帝に背くことになります！」

languages.text: {n}Vedka, dudaklarını daha sıkı şekilde birbirine bastırıyor.{/n} "Fakat... {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yapamam. Sizi savaşta korumazsam Tanrı İmparator'a karşı gelmiş olurum!"
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka, dudaklarını daha sıkı şekilde birbirine bastırıyor.{/n} "Fakat... {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yapamam. Sizi savaşta korumazsam Tanrı İmparator'a karşı gelmiş olurum!"

languages.text: {n}Vedka aprieta aún más los labios.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no puedo hacerlo. ¡No protegerl{mf|e|a} en combate sería una transgresión contra el Dios Emperador!».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka aprieta aún más los labios.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no puedo hacerlo. ¡No protegerl{mf|e|a} en combate sería una transgresión contra el Dios Emperador!».

languages.text: {n}薇德卡把嘴唇抿得更紧了。{/n}“大人，我不能离开。如果我没有在战斗中保护好您，那便是对神皇的不敬！”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡把嘴唇抿得更紧了。{/n}“大人，我不能离开。如果我没有在战斗中保护好您，那便是对神皇的不敬！”

languages.text: {n}Vedka serre les lèvres encore plus.{/n} « Je ne peux pas, Votre Seigneurie. Je manquerais à mon devoir envers l'Empereur-Dieu si je ne vous protégeais pas pendant ce combat ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka serre les lèvres encore plus.{/n} « Je ne peux pas, Votre Seigneurie. Je manquerais à mon devoir envers l'Empereur-Dieu si je ne vous protégeais pas pendant ce combat ! »

languages.text: {n}Vedka presst nur ihre Lippen zusammen.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das geht nicht. Ich würde mich vor dem Gottimperator versündigen, wenn ich Euch im Kampf nicht schützte!"
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka presst nur ihre Lippen zusammen.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, das geht nicht. Ich würde mich vor dem Gottimperator versündigen, wenn ich Euch im Kampf nicht schützte!"
